title: Assign Specific Board Owner to all Boards in the account
excerpt:
Hello, is there a way to retroactively add a an existing user as Board Owner to all of my account’s boards? 
And how to auto assign this user as Board Owner, every time we create a new board? 
thank you

posts.author: Lior.w3c (Lior)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, is there a way to retroactively add a an existing user as Board Owner to all of my account’s boards?

And how to auto assign this user as Board Owner, every time we create a new board?

thank you
